1.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
1.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

1.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
1.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

1.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
1.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

1.gl: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
1.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.
Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'
1.dv: contraction for H3068 (יְהֹוָה), and meaning the same;

1.gl: properly, an expanse, i.e. the firmament or (apparently) visible arch of the sky

2.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
2.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag
abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

2.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
2.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
2.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

3.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
3.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

3.gl: a skin-bag for liquids (from collapsing when empty); hence, a vase (as similar in shape when full); also a lyre (as having a body of like form)
a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn
3.dv: or שֹׁפָר; from H8231 (שָׁפַר) in the original sense of incising;
from a unused root meaning to twang;

4.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
4.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

4.gl: a musical chord (as parted into strings)
4.kj: in (the same) (Psalm 68:23), stringed instrument (Psalm 150:4), whereby (Psalm 45:8 (defective plural)).
4.dv: from an unused root meaning to apportion; a part; hence,
or עֻגָּב; from H5689 (עֲגַב) in the original sense of breathing;

5.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
5.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

5.gl: clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry; especially clangorof trumpets, as an alarum
5.kj: alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing).

5.gl: a clatter, i.e. (abstractly) whirring (of wings); (concretely) a cricket; also a harpoon (as rattling), a cymbal (as clanging)
something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement; abstractly, audience
5.kj: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings.

6.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
6.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

6.gl: a puff, i.e. wind, angry or vital breath, divine inspiration, intellect. or (concretely) an animal

6.kj: Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'
6.dv: contraction for H3068 (יְהֹוָה), and meaning the same;
